case_title: AMANDA ARROSPIDE VS. KIM KANH TRAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $550.00 FILED BY ARROSPIDE, AMANDA AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, KIM KANH D.B.A. LABELLE PERMANENT COSMETIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-25-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-25-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-25-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $35. SERVED JAN-10-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, KIM KANH D.B.A. LABELLE PERMANENT COSMETIC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-25-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARROSPIDE, AMANDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRAN, KIM KANH D.B.A. LABELLE PERMANENT COSMETIC $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $265.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, KIM KANH D.B.A. LABELLE PERMANENT COSMETIC
